details: The agent navigated to the correct Wikipedia page and extracted complete, accurate data. It correctly identified the 3 most recent years (2025, 2024, 2023) with all co-laureates listed for each year. The 2024 and 2023 entries match the known facts exactly. The 2025 entry (John Clarke, Michel H. Devoret, John M. Martinis) appears to be data present on the Wikipedia page at the time of access, which is consistent with the current date of 2026-04-03.
